Barishal.worker_briefing:
Barishal is at HIGH risk (score: 63.4/100).
Primary concerns: Child anemia prevalence, Active measles outbreak (2026).

Today's screening priorities:
  • Screen for measles: fever, rash, red eyes — check vaccination status
  • Screen children under 5 for anemia: pallor, fatigue, poor growth
  • Prioritise pregnant women: ANC visits, skilled birth attendance
  • Screen for TB: persistent cough >2 weeks, night sweats, weight loss

Chattogram.worker_briefing:
Chattogram is at HIGH risk (score: 69.0/100).
Primary concerns: Unmet healthcare needs, Elevated diabetes prevalence.

Today's screening priorities:
  • Screen adults for diabetes: thirst, frequent urination, weight loss
  • Screen for malaria: cyclical fever, chills, sweating

Dhaka.worker_briefing:
Dhaka is at CRITICAL risk (score: 100.0/100).
Primary concerns: High dengue burden, Active measles outbreak (2026).

Today's screening priorities:
  • Screen for dengue: fever, rash, joint pain, bleeding gums
  • Screen for measles: fever, rash, red eyes — check vaccination status
  • Screen adults for diabetes: thirst, frequent urination, weight loss
  • Screen for TB: persistent cough >2 weeks, night sweats, weight loss

Mymensingh.worker_briefing:
Mymensingh is at CRITICAL risk (score: 75.9/100).
⚡ Score adjusted by 2 field report(s) from Shasthya Shebikas.
Primary concerns: Recent field observations (2 reports), Active measles outbreak (2026).

Today's screening priorities:
  • Screen for measles: fever, rash, red eyes — check vaccination status
  • Prioritise pregnant women: ANC visits, skilled birth attendance
  • Screen for TB: persistent cough >2 weeks, night sweats, weight loss
  • Follow up on cases reported by field workers in this area
